rationale: Server selection spec requires selecting nearest server by RTT; useUnifiedTopology ignored latency window and selected randomly.
SCRAM spec requires verifying server's final proof before accepting authentication; driver allowed bypass of mutual auth.
Connection string spec requires 'tls' option to enable TLS; driver only recognized 'ssl', ignoring 'tls=true'.
Connection string spec requires port to default to 27017 when omitted; new URL parser threw assertion error instead.
Internal perf refactor removing wasteful Buffer.alloc(0) calls; no spec-defined behavior involved.
CRUD spec requires writeErrors[].index to reflect position in original bulk array; driver used position within writeErrors array.
Null property access crash in SCRAM auth under Lambda; implementation bug unrelated to a specific spec rule.
Synchronous errors swallowed by executeOperation; internal promise/callback plumbing bug with no spec-defined behavior.
SDAM spec requires dedicated monitoring connection separate from pool; driver reused pool connections with unlimited socket timeout.
UX improvement to server selection error messages; no spec-defined behavior involved.
Internal architecture refactor allowing custom BSON in AutoEncrypter; no spec rule contradicted.
Internal decoupling refactor moving bypassAutoEncryption logic into AutoEncrypter; no spec rule involved.
CMAP spec (via DRIVERS-688) defines 'connectionError' as valid ConnectionCheckOutFailedEvent reason; driver was missing this value.
Internal refactor integrating CMAP pool into unified topology; architectural change with no specific spec rule violated.
Ticket explicitly states the SDAM spec pseudocode for updateRsFromPrimary was missing a branch; spec gap caused the bug.
BSON Double/Int32 don't unwrap JS Number objects; implementation quality issue, BSON spec does not define JS object coercion behavior.
Handshake spec requires correct client metadata including platform; CMAP pool omitted platform from connection handshake.
Adding optional connectionId and duration fields to CMAP events; UX improvement, not a spec deviation.
Raw readPreference object passed to .equals() method causing TypeError; internal type-checking bug, no spec rule violated.
Replset 'left' event no longer emitted after upgrade; legacy event-forwarding regression, not spec-defined behavior.
Internal refactor replacing server selection timer loop with a wait queue; no spec behavior changed.
bufferMaxEntries option not respected by findOne; internal buffering option not defined in any spec.
SSL cert options stripped from pool options list causing TLS connection failure; implementation bug, CMAP spec doesn't specify TLS option handling.
User observed Node driver getting 'not master' errors retryWrites=true while pymongo succeeded; retryable writes spec not correctly implemented.
Server v4.2.2 segfault triggered by mapReduce with $ne; server-side bug, not a driver spec issue.
Description explicitly cites 'error handling section of the SDAM spec'; driver ignored non-timeout network errors instead of transitioning server to Unknown.
Adding exhaust command support to transport layer; new feature implementation, not a correction of wrong existing behavior.
CMAP Connection doesn't handle multiple inband message packets correctly; internal stream-reading implementation bug.
Improvement to implement error labels from DRIVERS-525 spec update; driver was not wrong before spec added this requirement.
Improvement per DRIVERS-651 making ExceededTimeLimit retryable; spec update adding new requirement, driver not previously wrong.
Internal refactor moving error handling from Topology into Server; no spec behavior changed.
Deprecating oplogReplay per DRIVERS-710 CRUD spec update; spec-driven deprecation, driver was not previously wrong.
cursor.hasNext() consumes first document when piped; Node.js stream interaction bug, no specific cursor spec rule violated.
Optimization: skip background minPoolSize task when minPoolSize=0; no spec rule specifies when background maintenance must run.
SDAM spec requires tracking maxElectionId as ObjectId comparisons; driver assumed Extended JSON format causing wrong election tracking.
User report of server selection timeout with secondary reads; underlying cause unclear from description, may be implementation or config.
After reconnection, driver failed server selection despite server being reachable; SDAM recovery behavior not correctly implemented.
Topology state machine transitions CLOSING after draining wait queue causing spurious errors; internal state ordering bug.
Internal refactor moving lib/core files to logical locations; no behavior change or spec involvement.
Stop forwarding topology events from Db object; internal API redesign, no spec-defined behavior involved.
Double close event emitted in Unified Topology; internal event-emission bug, no spec rule violated.
Removing callback support from cursor-returning methods; API breaking change with no spec conformance dimension.
Adding BSON as explicit dependency in mongodb-mock-server; dependency management, no spec behavior involved.
Mock server BSON property cleanup; internal test tooling fix with no spec behavior.
Switching to nyc for test coverage reporting; CI tooling change, no spec behavior involved.
Updating MongoClient API documentation for unified topology; docs update only.
Upgrading driver to BSON v4 library; dependency upgrade with no specific spec nonconformance.
BSON 1.x silently ignores unknown _bsontype producing empty document; BSON spec doesn't define behavior for invalid _bsontype values.
BSON v4 upgrades BSONSymbol to String losing type information; BSON library behavior change, spec does not mandate BSONSymbol round-trip preservation in JS.
ChangeStream silently stops receiving events on connection loss without firing error/close; implementation gap, no specific spec rule names required close-event behavior.
